zh.Gavere, East Flanders, Belgium: 比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維

zh.lifeSummary: 當Rasse de Gavre於大約1271年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維時，他的父親Johann de Gavre II24歲，母親Sibylle De Lille24歲。他和Catherine de Mechelen至少有3個兒子。他去世於1339年之後。

zh-hans.Gaver,Oost Vlaanderen,Belgium: 比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫貝爾拉雷
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rasse de Gavre于大约1271年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維时，他的父亲Johann de Gavre II24岁，母亲Sibylle De Lille24岁。他和Catherine de Mechelen至少有3个儿子。他去世于1339年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gavre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German Köber (see Kober ) or Göber (see Gober ).

variants.name: Kober
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Bernhard, Angelika, Dieter, Ernst, Erwin, Gottlieb, Konrad, Manfred, Reinhold, Sepp, Wolfgang.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a shortened derivative of the personal name Jakob (see Jacob ).

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German kober, German Kober ‘basket’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a basket maker or perhaps a nickname for someone who carried a basket on his back.

nameMeanings.name: Rasse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Dirk, Joris.
German: topographic name from Middle High German rœsse ‘kiln’, in particular one used for drying hemp and flax or for burning lime.
English and Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Ross  .

variants.name: Ross
meanings: Either an adoption of the Gaelic topographic term ros ‘headland’ ( compare Glen , Kyle ) or a transferred use of the Scottish surname, which is borne by a large and ancient family whose members have played a major role in Scottish history. Although still very popular in Scotland, the name is now in widespread general use.

en.lifeSummary: When Rasse de Gavre was born about 1271, in Gavere, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Johann de Gavre II, was 24 and his mother, Sibylle De Lille, was 24. He had at least 3 sons with Catherine de Mechelen. He died after 1339.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rasse de Gavre est né environ 1271, à Gavere, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Johann de Gavre II, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Sibylle De Lille, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Catherine de Mechelen. Il est décédé après 1339.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rasse de Gavre um 1271 in Gavere, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johann de Gavre II 24 und seine Mutter Sibylle De Lille 24. Er hatte mit Catherine de Mechelen mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb nach 1339.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rasse de Gavre è nato il circa 1271 nel Gavere, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Johann de Gavre II, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Sibylle De Lille, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Catherine de Mechelen. Morì dopo il 1339.

ja.Gavere, East Flanders, Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンガバー
ja.Lille,Antwerpen,Belgium: ベルギーアントウエルペンリル
ja.Gavre, Flandre Orientale, Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンガバー
ja.Gaver,Oost Vlaanderen,Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンバーラー
ja.lifeSummary: Rasse de Gavreが約1271年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンガバーで生まれた時，父Johann de Gavre IIは24歳，母Sibylle De Lilleは24歳であった。彼はCatherine de Mechelenとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1339年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rasse de Gavre(이)가 대략 1271년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 게이버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johann de Gavre II(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibylle De Lille(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Catherine de Mechelen(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1339년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rasse de Gavre nasceu aproximadamente 1271, em Gavere, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Johann de Gavre II, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Sibylle De Lille, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Catherine de Mechelen. Ele faleceu após 1339.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rasse de Gavre родился около 1271 г. в местности гавир, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Johann de Gavre II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Sibylle De Lille, 24. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Catherine de Mechelen. Он умер после 1339 г.

sm.Abt 1271–AFTER 1339: e tusa o le 1271–ina ua ma'ea le 1339

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rasse de Gavre nació aproximadamente 1271, en Gavere, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Johann de Gavre II, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Sibylle De Lille, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Catherine de Mechelen. Murió después de 1339.
